results.text: The Gibbering: The psyker screams and babbles uncontrollably as warp energy courses through them. They are Stunned for 1d5 rounds.
Warp Burn: The psyker takes 1d10+WPB Energy damage, ignoring armour, as warp fire scorches their flesh and soul.
Psychic Concussion: A wave of psychic force explodes outward. Everyone within 3d10 metres is Stunned for 1d5 rounds. The psyker is Stunned for 2d10 rounds.
Psy Howl: A psychic scream tears through the minds of everyone nearby. All characters within 5m × Psy Rating take WPB Insanity Points.
Soul Sear: The psyker’s connection to the warp is seared by its touch, suffering 1d5 permanent Willpower damage as part of their soul is burned away.
Locked In: The psyker becomes catatonic for 1d5 rounds, their mind trapped in a warp nightmare. They also take 4d10 Energy damage as their body convulses.
Chronological Incontinence: Time distorts around the psyker. Everyone within 2d10 metres is Stunned for 1 round as they experience temporal dislocation, and all affected characters age 1d10 years.
Psychic Noise: All psykers within 5d10 metres are Stunned for 1d5 rounds by a deafening psychic roar. All Psychic Phenomena rolls in the area gain +10 for the next 1d5 hours.
Warp Whispers: Everyone within 1d100 metres hears terrible voices from beyond the veil. Each must pass a Willpower Test or gain 1d10 Corruption Points.

Vice Versa: The psyker’s mind is swapped with that of a random person within 10 metres for 1d10 rounds. Both inhabit the other’s body, using its physical characteristics but their own mental characteristics.
Dark Summoning: The barrier between reality and the warp tears open. A lesser daemon manifests within 3d10 metres of the psyker and acts according to its nature.
Ethereal Storm: Warp energy explodes outward from the psyker. Everyone within 2d10 metres takes 1d10+5 Energy damage with Penetration 5 as raw immaterium lashes their bodies.
Blood Tide: Blood pours from the psyker’s orifices in a horrific torrent. The psyker takes 2d10 damage ignoring armour and gains the Bleeding condition.
Cataclysmic Blast: A massive explosion of warp energy erupts centred on the psyker. Everyone within the Blast (5m) area takes 2d10+4 Energy damage with Penetration 8.
Mass Possession: Daemonic entities attempt to possess everyone nearby. All characters must pass a Willpower Test or gain 2d10 Corruption Points. The psyker automatically fails this test.
Reality Quake: Reality itself tears and buckles. All characters within 1d100 metres take 1d10 Willpower damage as the fabric of the materium shreds around them. The area becomes permanently haunted.

Annihilation: The psyker’s body is utterly destroyed as their soul is torn screaming into the warp. A warp rift opens at their location, and nothing remains but a blackened scorch mark and the echo of their final scream.

Daemonic Possession: A powerful daemon seizes control of the psyker entirely. The psyker’s personality is suppressed and the daemon takes full control of their body, using it as a vessel to wreak havoc upon the materium.
